About

Product Executive
in Nutraceuticals

Nikita Garg is a Senior Product Executive specializing in Nutraceutical Product Management, New Product Development (NPD), Regulatory Affairs, Product Commercialization, and Batch Costing.

With experience contributing to the development of 100+ nutraceutical products and supporting 50+ product launches, she has worked across product development, FSSAI compliance, export documentation, label claim validation, product costing, and market-ready commercialization.

Her expertise spans product lifecycle management, regulatory affairs, product strategy, and cross-functional collaboration to bring innovative nutraceutical products from concept to market.
